docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $904.00 FILED BY DROZ, JERRY AS TO DEFENDANT ACHILLES, PHILLIP /AMERICAN TAXICAB ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-13-2008 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-13-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-13-2008 BY PAUL SLAVIT. ALL PARTIES PRESENT. EXHIBITS FROM BOTH SIDES RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO PHILLIP ACHILLES BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF MAY-13-2008 AT 10:00AM.
ORDER (SC-108A) ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT IS "DENIED". THE COURT IS NOT REQUIRED TO ISSUE A STATEMENT OF DECISION OR OPINION EXPLAINING ITS JUDGMENT, PER COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT.
JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ACHILLES, PHILLIP /AMERICAN TAXICAB AS TO PLAINTIFF DROZ, JERRY
PLAINTIFF'S CORRESPONDENCE DISPUTING THE JUDGEMENT RENDERED WAS RETURNED. TOLD TO CONTACT LEGAL ADVISOR FOR CORRECT PROCEDURE.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT ACHILLES, PHILLIP /AMERICAN TAXICAB
REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER, REC'D AND FILED, SENT COPY TO DEFT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DROZ, JERRY
SC-108: "ANSWER" ON REQUEST TO CORRECT OR CANCEL JUDGMENT AND ANSWER RECEIVED AND FILED. FILED BY DEFENDANT ACHILLES, PHILLIP /AMERICAN TAXICAB AS TO PLAINTIFF DROZ, JERRY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED SERVED MAR-27-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT ACHILLES, PHILLIP /AMERICAN TAXICAB
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-13-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DROZ, JERRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ACHILLES, PHILLIP /AMERICAN TAXICAB $96.00 PRINCIPAL, $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $156.00, DEFENDANT PHILLIP ACHILLES, AN INDIVIDUAL, DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED SEP-02-2008 ORDERED DESTROYED
ORDER ON JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S DECLARATION RE: REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO CCP 116.850. REQUEST GRANTED.
